Who We Are

About Light Wave Electrical and Solar

Light Wave Electrical and Solar provides professional electrical installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting alongside complete solar solutions — from system design and panel installation to inverter setup, battery backup, and energy management. We're committed to delivering reliable, safe, and sustainable power solutions for homes, businesses, and industries.

Electrical Installation & Maintenance
Solar System Design
Solar Panel Installation
Inverter Installation
Battery Backup Solutions
Energy Management Services
Work With Us

What We Offer

Our Services

Complete electrical and solar energy solutions, handled by one certified team from design through to maintenance.

Solar Panel Installation

Custom-designed solar PV systems, professionally installed to convert sunlight into clean, reliable electricity.

Inverter Installation

Expert supply and installation of high-performance inverters that convert solar and battery power into stable electricity.

Battery Backup Systems

Durable battery storage solutions that keep your lights on and equipment running during grid outages.

Electrical Wiring & Rewiring

Safe, code-compliant wiring and rewiring for new builds and renovations, carried out by licensed electricians.

Electrical Maintenance & Repairs

Routine inspections, fault diagnosis, and prompt repairs to keep your electrical systems safe and efficient.

Generator Installation & Maintenance

Sales, installation, and servicing of standby generators for uninterrupted backup power.

Smart Home Electrical Solutions

Modern automation for lighting, security, and energy control — managed right from your fingertips.

Commercial & Industrial Electrical

Large-scale electrical installation and maintenance for offices, factories, and industrial facilities.

Built On Trust, Backed By Expertise

Trained & EquippedFull PPE on every job site

Certified Technicians

Fully trained and certified to handle every electrical and solar project safely.

24/7 Customer Support

Reliable Solar Solutions

Dependable solar systems engineered to keep your power on, rain or shine.

Customer Satisfaction Guaranteed

We stand behind every installation with a commitment to your complete satisfaction.
